## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials or secrets in the diff
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env variables were added
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` convention
